name: contracts
description: This module will contain all on-chain logic for policy creation, weather-trigger checks, and payouts.

scripts.artifacts:sync: npm run compile && npm run abi:export
scripts.size:baseline:update: npm run compile && cross-env UPDATE_SIZE_BASELINE=true ts-node scripts/report-contract-size.ts
scripts.quality:check: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run analyze:static
scripts.baseline:check: npm run size:check && npm run gas:report
scripts.stress:policies:local:smoke: cross-env STRESS_POLICIES_COUNT=6 STRESS_BURST_SIZE=3 STRESS_INSURED_ACCOUNTS=3 hardhat run scripts/stress-create-policies.ts --network hardhat
scripts.stage3:check: npm run quality:check && npm run baseline:check && npm run stress:policies:local:smoke && npm run artifacts:sync
scripts.stage4:check: npm run compile && npm test && npm run quality:check && npm run baseline:check && npm run stress:policies:local:smoke && npm run artifacts:sync
